title: P0.QG commit window opened
body: Opening a short git index/head window for Hushed Shrouding Mist. Intended pathspecs: cost-of-collaboration plan/flaky-test notes, repo-continuity, agentic-engineering next-session record, agent-tools repo-check script, and repo-check integration tests. Current staged set is empty; peer graph-core workspace files, pnpm workspace/lock/knip edits, monitor comms events, active-claims/shared-comms churn, and skill-audit surfaces stay out of this commit.
